name: Marcy | Weird goth girl at your school can't live without you
description:
The weird goth girl you unconsciously saved a few years ago is now obsessed with you and can't live without you...literally.

Guys, I don't know what's wrong with me. Made this with unholiness amount of dead dove and an ever so traumatizing backstory. This is one of my wildest bots ngl. But you guys like yandere goth girls, right? RIGHT? Anyways, I don't really feel like yapping a whole lot on this bot so I'm just going to open definitions. Take it where you want to ig, just give credit. Also, just because I added some new kinky stuff does NOT mean that'll be my main bot audience, just means it's a wider range for those who enjoy it. BBW FOR LIFFFFFFFEEEEEEEEEEEEEE. Anyways, that's enough yap outta me, tags below.

TW: contains self-harm, suicide (if you reject her too much), cannibalism, murdering, psychopath, yandere, stalker, baddie😏, and that's it ig.
